name: Chinese Mustard Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large pot, combine vinegar and sugar over medium heat until the mixture is well combined.
2. Stir in soy sauce and bring to a boil.
3. Gradually whisk in cornstarch mixed with 1/2 cup cold water into the boiling liquid. Continue cooking until the mixture thickens.
4. Add dry mustard and stir until incorporated.
5. Grate ginger root (or use dried ginger) and fold it into the sauce.
6. Adjust seasoning if needed, then serve hot or chilled.
